title: ArchitectureAuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by a chain retrospective task that verified the substrate against an architecture audit doc (e.g. AGENT_AUDIT_AND_MIGRATION.md). One row per audit pass; the findings array carries one entry per checklist item with status + evidence + severity. The event itself is the self-hosting proof — the substrate is exercised to record its own audit outcome. See AGENT_AUDIT_AND_MIGRATION.md §10 for the canonical output shape.

audit_doc.description: Pointer to the audit source-doc the findings were keyed against — title, path, or stable identifier.

summary.description: One- or two-paragraph executive summary of the audit outcome.

recommended_next_phase.description: Free-text recommendation for the next phase of work (e.g. "Phase 4 — frontend cutover, legacy table retirement"). Optional.

findings.description: One entry per audit checklist item. Severity uses the audit-convention enum (low / medium / high / critical); use n/a for informational findings.

item.description: Audit checklist item identifier and short description.

status.description: pass = criterion satisfied; fail = criterion not satisfied (must file follow-on); partial = satisfied with documented gap; deferred = explicitly out of scope for this chain.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting status — SQL query result, test name, commit SHA, doc pointer, etc.

severity.description: Severity if status is fail/partial. n/a for informational rows.
